name: golang-github-benbjohnson-clock-dev
title: golang-github-benbjohnson-clock-dev
summary: library for mocking time in Go
description:
library for mocking time in Go
It provides an interface around the standard library's time package so that
the application can use the realtime clock while tests can use the mock clock.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-benbjohnson-clock-dev because library for mocking time in Go.

When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-benbjohnson-clock-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
